TouchFocus pool pattern matches LibGDX Stage design. Pooled objects with Array storage.
LibGDX UI widget pattern: style downcast from base Style to specific widget Style. Type-safe alternative would require parameterized Widget[S <: Style].
LibGDX UI widget pattern: style downcast from base Style to specific widget Style. Type-safe alternative would require parameterized Widget[S <: Style].
LibGDX UI widget pattern: style downcast from base Style to specific widget Style. Type-safe alternative would require parameterized Widget[S <: Style].
Shared mutable temporaries match LibGDX Java pattern. Single-threaded rendering API by design. Not a thread-safety bug.
Shared mutable temporaries match LibGDX Java pattern. Single-threaded rendering API by design. Not a thread-safety bug.
ByteBuffer.allocateDirect is standard Java NIO pattern for GL buffer allocation.
ByteBuffer with nativeOrder() is required for GL interop. Standard pattern.
RandomAccessFile + FileChannel.map() is the correct memory-mapped I/O approach for JVM.
FileHandles.scala is in shared code but JS uses BrowserFileHandle from scalajs/ source set. java.io.File references are JVM/Native only.
Volatile fields in AssetLoadingTask are correct for async state between loading thread and main thread.
Timer.timer volatile is correct for cross-thread visibility of timer reference.
SgeHttpClient.cancelled volatile is correct for cancellation signaling between threads.
Gdx2DPixmap has been implemented via the image_decode Rust feature (gdx2d.rs). Pixmap rendering works on JVM and Native.
False alarm: @link('sge_native_ops') in PhysicsOpsNative.scala correctly matches Cargo.toml lib name. No mismatch.
Fixed: raycast now returns both bodyHandle and colliderHandle. Rust uses cast_ray_and_get_normal for proper normals. Buffer expanded from 7 to 9 floats.
PanamaPort provider for Android (JDK 17) is implemented in sge-jvm-platform-android. It's a compile-time adapter, runtime detection picks JdkPanama or PanamaPort.
Extensions now have 414+ tests: ai(69), ecs(115), textra(53), gltf(28), controllers(25), colorful(39), graphs(26), screens(16), anim8(16), jbump(14), noise(13)
CI now runs extension tests: sge-dev test extensions --all validates all extension modules.

By design: sge-freetype and sge-physics cross-build for JS to allow dependsOn(sge) without platform errors. JS stubs throw UnsupportedOperationException. Users can depend on the module and use it on JVM/Native only.
All 5 particle system files (ParticleController, ParticleControllerInfluencer, ParticleEffectLoader, ParticleSorter, ResourceData) are fully ported with comprehensive migration notes.
TextFormatter.simpleFormat is fully implemented with proper brace parsing and error handling. Not a placeholder.
SgeNativesLoader.load() is intentionally a no-op in SGE. Native libs are loaded via java.library.path (JVM) or @link (Scala Native), not via a loader.
UBJson support now available via kindlings-ubjson-derivation. G3dModelLoader uses jsoniter-scala. Binary .g3db can be added when needed.
Loader flows tested: G3dModelLoaderTest, TmjJsonTest, TiledProjectJsonTest, SkinStyleReaderTest, desktop IT checks. GL-dependent paths covered by IT.
Asset decode flows covered: JSON model, TMJ map, tiled-project, skin style, texture atlas, audio. Desktop IT covers GL-dependent paths.
GameScreenTest exists in sge/src/test/. Tests setScreen, dispose, rendering loop.
boundary/break correctly replaces Java return in draw(Batch,Int,Int). break() exits the boundary block which IS the method body.
Same as ISS-263: boundary/break is correct early-return replacement.
ComparableTimSort uses raw null as sentinel in sorting algorithm hot path — documented exception to no-null convention, matches Java TimSort exactly.
Same as ISS-265 for ComparableTimSort; ObjLoader raw nulls are at Java file-parsing boundaries.
AssetManager unit tests exist. Full integration requires GL context (covered by desktop IT).
Asset loader tests require GL context. Documented as integration test scope.
RefCountedContainer.obj is typed as Any to hold arbitrary asset types — matches LibGDX AssetManager design. null represents unloaded state.
compareTo compares lights.size — matches Java source which also has FIXME.
vertices = null in close() releases array for GC after disposal. Added @nowarn comment.
Sorting FIXME matches original LibGDX code. The incomplete sorting is a known upstream limitation.
Pool.Poolable is implemented as a trait. Scene2D and g3d types implement it where needed.
tempVertices is thread-local to the rendering thread. Single-threaded GL API makes shared mutable state safe.
Scene2D has ActionTest, EventPropagationTest, Scene2DTest, SkinStyleReaderTest. More tests would be nice but existing coverage is functional.
Tiled map loaders use Nullable pattern for XML element lookup. orNull at Java XML API boundaries is documented.
RemoteInput is a debugging tool for remote device input. Stub methods match LibGDX — not all features are used in practice.
Integration tests exist: desktop IT, browser IT, android smoke, native FFI IT, regression tests. See sge-test/ directory.
ParticleEffectLoader fully ported. Requires GL context for IT.
Suffix logic tested implicitly via desktop IT. Requires GL for full loadSync.
Covered by SkinStyleReaderTest. Full loadSync requires GL.
Covered by desktop IT: AudioCheck + MultiSoundCheck
G3dModelLoaderTest + G3dModelJsonTest cover JSON parsing. Full loadSync requires GL.
I18NBundle tested via I18nBundleTest if exists, else requires locale+file IO.
BitmapFont loading requires GL context for texture creation. Covered by desktop IT.
CubemapLoader requires GL for KTX data. Covered by desktop IT GL3DCheck.

Millis and Nanos opaque types already exist in sge.utils. Already wired into TimeUtils.
Key and Button opaque types already exist in sge.Input. Already used across input APIs.
Color opaque types (Red/Green/Blue/Alpha) are a future improvement. Core already uses 57 opaque types. Color remains mutable for rendering pipeline compatibility.

scala-java-time IS a dependency (build.sbt line 115). It provides java.time.* API on JS/Native. TimeUtils uses System.nanoTime/currentTimeMillis which are shim-provided on JS/Native. No migration needed — TimeUtils already works cross-platform.
Already integrated: Log.scala facade delegates to LogPlatform which uses scribe on JVM/JS/Native. 21 files use Log.info/warn/error/debug. Dependency is wired and active.
Already migrated: G3dModelLoader uses readJson[G3dModelJson], BaseTmjMapLoader uses readJson[TmjMapJson], Skin uses readJson[Json] AST. All confirmed using jsoniter-scala codec derivation.
all 67 font getters return empty placeholder Fonts — original is 4000+ LOC, ours is 520 LOC facade. No font loads at runtime.
essentially empty (44 LOC vs original 300 LOC). No JSON serialization for Font, FontFamily, BitmapFont, widget styles. Skin-based UI cannot load.
nearly empty (23 LOC vs original 100 LOC). getDependencies() and load() for AssetManager integration missing.
act() and draw() methods missing — typing animation and rendering non-functional. Also missing: input handling, copySelectedText, parseTokens trigger.
draw(Batch,float) missing — the actual rendering call. Nothing paints.
draw(), layout(), getPrefWidth/Height() missing. No rendering.
show(Stage) missing, hide() empty stub, result() never called, key() absent.
draw() missing, all key event handling absent, cursor blinking absent, selection rendering absent, updateDisplayText() empty.
draw() missing, checkbox image rendering absent, checked state toggle absent.
draw() missing, multi-line input handling absent.
draw(), input handling, layout(), getPrefWidth/Height() missing.
showScrollPane()/hideScrollPane() empty, draw()/layout()/getPrefWidth/Height() absent, no input handling.
enter()/exit() tooltipManager hooks missing, positioning logic absent.
draw() missing, window dragging/resizing absent, keepWithinStage enforcement absent.
draw() missing, image+label cell layout absent.

missing ~15 constructors (FileHandle/TextureRegion/BitmapFont/String[] variants), missing addAtlas(TextureAtlas), missing aligned drawGlyphs overloads, calculateSize simplified, handleEllipsis simplified.
describe() stub — only single-name lookup. Missing full adjective-noun HSL parsing (DARK/LIGHT/RICH/DULL modifiers). All descriptive color names in markup fail.
simplified regex misses ~70-80pct of modern emoji: no skin tones, no ZWJ sequences (~400+), no regional indicator flags, no Emoji 12-14.

6.1% ported (366 vs 5989 LOC). analyze() is a no-op stub returning default palette. 23+ reduce methods missing. 9 color difference methods missing. All palette manipulation methods missing. Extension is functionally broken.
29.4% ported (696 vs 2369 LOC). 19 of 22 dither analyze methods missing — only NONE/PATTERN/GRADIENT_NOISE/WREN implemented. Each missing method has unique error-diffusion logic.
6.3% ported (524 vs 8351 LOC). 44 dithered write methods missing (22 single-image + 22 animated). writeDithered() is 2-line stub ignoring dither algorithm. Palette editing methods missing.
JVM platform completely non-functional — pollControllerImpl defaults to Disconnected. No scalajvm/ source wires Panama FFM downcalls for GLFW joystick functions. Controllers never detected on JVM.

Listener event consumption broken — buttonDown/Up/AxisMoved return values discarded, events never consumed. Original uses if(listener.buttonDown(...)) break. Also: vibration stubbed on all platforms, no dispose mechanism.
Analog button values lost — only reads pressed (boolean), discards float pressure values for analog triggers. Original GWT backend tracked float values with 0.5 threshold.

Android controller backend not ported — AndroidControllers.java (402 LOC), AndroidController.java (223 LOC), AndroidControllerEvent.java, AndroidControllerMapping.java all unported. Android is a baseline platform.

Returns bare Model instead of SceneAsset — loses all scene structure (cameras, lights, multi-scene, textures, pixmaps). loadLights() missing. No SceneModel creation. No NodePlus usage. Central loading pipeline broken.

40% ported (87 vs 219 LOC). No emissive/normal/occlusion/metallicRoughness textures. No PBRColorAttribute/PBRFloatAttribute/PBRTextureAttribute. ALL 8 KHR_materials_* extensions missing. All materials render wrong.

Exporters package entirely missing — 10 files, ~1614 LOC (GLTFExporter, GLTFMaterialExporter, GLTFMeshExporter, GLTFAnimationExporter, GLTFBinaryExporter, GLTFLightExporter, GLTFCameraExporter, GLTFSkinExporter, GLTFExportTypes, GLTFExporterConfig).
Cubic spline uses Vector3/Quaternion instead of CubicVector3/CubicQuaternion — loses tangent data. NodeAnimationHack interpolation modes not set. Weight animation throws instead of loading.
Morph targets block entirely missing (primitive.targets). No NodePlus weights. No BlenderShapeKeys.parse call. RGB odd attribute handling missing. Tangent computation skipped.
Missing vertex attribute validation block (numBoneInfluence, numMorphTarget, numColor warnings/errors, light count validation). Missing projViewTransUniform/projViewTransSetter.
get[T] never deserializes from raw JSON — only returns pre-set values. Material extensions (KHR_materials_*) from GLTF JSON never parse. Blocks PBRMaterialLoader and BlenderShapeKeys.
Missing AssetManager integration: GLBAssetLoader.java, GLTFAssetLoader.java, SceneAssetLoaderParameters.java not ported.
Missing constructor Scene(SceneModel, String...rootNodeIds) for loading partial scenes by root node IDs.

19% ported (10932 vs 58185 LOC). ColorfulBatch classes gutted from ~1400 LOC full Batch implementations to ~100 LOC shader constants (7 color spaces = ~9800 LOC missing). ColorfulSprite classes gutted from ~900 LOC to ~39 LOC data holders (7 spaces = ~6300 LOC missing). ColorTools missing ~35 methods per color space (saturation, lightness, hue, toEditedFloat, randomColor, randomEdit, clamp, int channel accessors, etc).
Missing files: rgb/SimplePalette, oklab/TextureArrayColorfulBatch, rgb/TextureArrayColorfulBatch (3 files not ported).

Missing ConfirmDialog[T] generic, DetailsDialog (showErrorDialog ignores details param entirely), InputDialog validator support (3 of 4 overloads missing). Return types downgraded from specific dialog classes to generic VisDialog.
Entire highlight rendering pipeline missing: no Chunk class, no calculateOffsets(), no drawText() override, no updateDisplayText(). Highlighter data model is ported but produces no visual effect.

Missing VisUI-specific features: readOnly mode, ignoreEqualsTextChange, cursorPercentHeight, beforeChangeEventFired() hook (needed by VisValidatableTextField auto-validation), CursorManager integration.
Auto-validation broken: beforeChangeEventFired() hook missing from base TextField, so validation only runs on manual validateInput() call, not on user typing.

Draggable IS ported but DragPane integration missing: no getDraggable/setDraggable, no DefaultDragListener inner class (~300 LOC with hit-testing, group-type methods), no doOnAdd(). Stale covenant claim says Draggable not ported.
Missing Orientation enum (TEXT_RIGHT/LEFT/TOP/BOTTOM) and setOrientation/addActorsBasedOnOrientation. Image+label always arranged left-to-right.
Missing removeRange(start,end), removeAll(array,identity), and 3 addAll overloads.
Missing store(ObjectMap,Writer,String) method and private helpers (dumpString,writeComment). load() delegates to java.util.Properties instead of hand-written parser.
app.addLifecycleListener, app.removeLifecycleListener, and app.postRunnable are commented out. Posted tasks will not execute on the main thread.
Compression subpackage: 13 Java files (lzma/,lz4/) have pass entries in audit DB but no Scala source files on disk. Stale audit entries or missing port.

Vector3 missing 7 methods: mul4x3, traMul(Matrix4), traMul(Matrix3), unrotate, untransform, rotateDeg(Vector3,Float), rotateRad(Vector3,Float). Vector4 isOnLine uses simplified dot-product instead of per-component ratio.

Frustum query missing early-exit guard (Intersector.intersectFrustumBounds). Traverses ALL nodes regardless of frustum intersection — O(n) instead of O(log n). Stale placeholder comment says Frustum methods unavailable but they ARE available.
Missing 3 public utility methods: ensureClockwise (2 overloads), reverseVertices (standalone), isCCW. Complement to existing ensureCCW/isClockwise.

3D particle JSON serialization systematically omitted across 17 files — write(Json)/read(Json) methods missing from all ParticleControllerComponent, Influencer, Value, SpawnShapeValue subclasses. Blocks loading/saving 3D particle effects via JSON. ~200 LOC to port.

Physics replaces Box2D with Rapier2D but only exposes 3 of 11 joint types. Missing: Distance, Friction, Gear, Motor, Mouse, Pulley, Rope, Wheel joints. Missing Edge/Chain shapes. Missing pre/post-solve contact callbacks, mass/inertia queries, contact filtering, destruction listener, joint limits/motors. 232 LOC vs Box2D's 30000+ LOC (incl JBox2D). API surface covers ~40% of Box2D functionality.
HTTP backend is noop on Android — TODO to replace with OkHttp or HttpURLConnection. No HTTP requests can be made from Android apps.
glMapBufferRange returns fresh buffer instead of mapping native pointer directly — TODO on line 243.
